title: pelexia pavonii
intro: Pelexia pavonii is a species of orchid, also known as the 'Peacock's Slipper Orchid', which belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Pelexia pavonii include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and certain types of infections. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made by infusing its roots and rhizomes in hot water or by boiling it in a decoction to create a medicinal tea.
